name: UCW Limited
summary: UCW Limited, through its subsidiaries, provides tertiary education services in Australia and internationally. It offers accredited vocational education in the fields of ageing support, community services, counselling, dance teaching, early childhood education and care, fitness, mental health, remedial massage, sport and recreation management, and yoga teaching. The company was formerly known as Undercoverwear Limited and changed its name to UCW Limited in January 2015. UCW Limited was incorporated in 2004 and is based in Sydney, Australia.
